body_txt: This is in particular a staple of lesbian related works and scenes. Intertwined fingers can often indicate lesbian relationships without getting explicit about it . In fact, see the Yuri Genre article for other good illustrations of this trope. Yaoi Genre comics and their other forms will also occasionally use this trope, often as a subtle Ho Yay or Discretion Shot to turn their relationship up a notch. Has absolutely nothing to do with Finger-Tenting or Fingore —probably.
